antiZionistNotes: No pastors from any Continental 3FU denomination found in Knox Seminary Open Letter signatory lists or with public anti-Zionist statements. These are very conservative Reformed denominations that hold standard covenantal theology (non-Zionist by default) but none have active anti-Zionist voices.
lgbtqStatus: All sub-denominations maintain traditional biblical sexual ethics. No LGBTQ-affirming churches found. The URCNA specifically broke from CRC partly over LGBTQ/women ordination issues.

womenLeadership.pastorsAndElders: None of these denominations ordain women as pastors or elders.
womenLeadership.deacons: The RCUS, PRCA, URCNA, NRC, FRCNA, and HRC all restrict the diaconate to qualified males. No women deacons in any of these denominations.
